raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/XXXX, I notified Best Buy Citi that an account had been opened in my name without my knowledge, authorization, or consent. I did not apply for this account, did not authorize anyone to open it on my behalf, and have never used the account. 

I informed Best Buy Citi that this matter involved identity theft and the non-consensual use of my personal information. I subsequently provided supporting documentation, including a Police Report and FTC Identity Theft Report, which were faxed and emailed to the bank. 

Best Buy Citi closed my claim but verbally advised that the investigation could be reopened. I requested copies of the documents relied upon to open the account, including the original application/enrollment records, identity verification records , authorization/signature documentation, method of application, and any IP or device-related identifiers associated with the account opening. 

Despite multiple requests, Best Buy Citi did not provide the requested documentation. 

On XX/XX/year>, I formally submitted a written reinvestigation request, along with a notarized identity theft statement, Police Report, and FTC Identity Theft Report. XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX has indicated whether the matter is still under review nor has it not produced the requested supporting records.
